dbFix.description: public.users 테이블에 isSuperAdmin BOOLEAN 컬럼 추가 + superadmin 계정 true 설정
sql: ALTER TABLE public.users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS "isSuperAdmin" boolean DEFAULT false;
UPDATE public.users SET "isSuperAdmin" = true WHERE username = 'superadmin';
